hero.title: We bring high-purity nanomaterials from proven producers to US industry.
hero.description: Graphene nanoplatelets, graphene oxide, reduced graphene oxide — sourced from ISO-certified facilities, independently tested in US labs, delivered with full regulatory compliance.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: We handle the hard parts so you don't have to.

steps.title: Sourcing & vetting
steps.description: We work directly with established producers — companies with real facilities, ISO certification, and industrial-scale output. Not university labs. Not brokers reselling from Alibaba.

steps.title: Independent testing
steps.description: Every material we distribute gets characterized at US laboratories. Raman spectroscopy, SEM/EDS, XRD, AFM — the full panel. We build the TDS and COA that procurement teams actually trust.

steps.title: Regulatory & logistics
steps.description: TSCA compliance, customs classification, SDS documentation, import logistics. We clear the regulatory path so materials move smoothly from origin to your facility.

steps.title: US-based distribution
steps.description: Local warehousing, responsive support, consistent supply. We're your stateside partner — not a middleman overseas you can't reach on the phone.

markets.title: Industries we serve
markets.subtitle: Nanomaterials are already in production across these sectors. We supply the materials that make the difference.

items.name: Polymers & composites
items.detail: Strength, conductivity, and weight reduction additives

items.name: Energy storage
items.detail: Battery anodes, supercapacitors, fuel cell components

items.name: Lubricants
items.detail: Friction reduction and thermal management additives

items.name: Electronics
items.detail: Conductive inks, thermal interface materials, EMI shielding

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Whether you need nanomaterial supply for production or you're a producer looking for US market access — reach out. We respond within one business day.

form.name: Name
form.sentSub: We'll get back to you within one business day.
